data_schema: id(int); spacegroup(int categorical); number_of_total_atoms(float); percent_atom_al/ga/in(float fractions sum~1); lattice_vector_1/2/3_ang(float); lattice_angle_alpha/beta/gamma_degree(float). TWO regression TARGETS: formation_energy_ev_natom and bandgap_energy_ev (both >=0).
extra_notes: Dual-target regression. Metric = mean of column-wise RMSLE over the two targets. Train one model per target (or multi-output). Both targets are non-negative, so log1p target transform is appropriate. submission.csv columns: id,formation_energy_ev_natom,bandgap_energy_ev. CV_SCORE must be the mean column-wise RMSLE (lower is better).
